connectionId.description: The TaxCloud connection the calculation ran under.

items.description: One calculated cart per submitted cart, in the same order, with per-line-item tax rates and amounts.

transactionDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the carts were calculated for.

message.description: Optional human-readable detail about the component's status; typically present only when degraded or unhealthy.

status.description: Health of this individual component: 'healthy', 'degraded', or 'unhealthy'.

merchantName.description: Legal or trading name of the merchant business. Required; must be 1–255 characters.

contactFirst.description: First name of the merchant's primary contact. Optional.

contactLast.description: Last name of the merchant's primary contact. Optional.

contactEmail.description: Email address of the merchant's primary contact; used for TaxCloud invitations and notifications. Optional.

sendTaxcloudInvite.description: Sends invite to set up and connect a TaxCloud account to a merchant who does not already use TaxCloud. To connect a TaxCloud account for a merchant who already uses TaxCloud, use the "Set Merchant Credentials" function.

referenceId.description: The ID you use in your own system to identify this merchant.

merchantId.description: UUID assigned to the newly created merchant; use it in subsequent merchant operations.
UUID of the merchant whose TaxCloud credentials are being deleted. The merchant must be owned by the calling account.
UUID of the merchant whose credentials were deleted.
UUID of the merchant to soft-delete. The merchant must be owned by the calling account.
UUID of the deleted merchant.

location.description: Where the error occurred, e.g. 'body.items[3].tags' or 'path.thing-id'

value.description: The value at the given location

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.
examples: Property foo is required but is missing.

errors.description: Optional list of individual error details

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem.

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type. This value should not change between occurrences of the error.

type.description: A URI reference to human-readable documentation for the error.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant whose TaxCloud credentials are being retrieved. The merchant must be owned by the calling account.

apiKey.description: TaxCloud API key currently associated with the merchant.

connectionId.description: TaxCloud connection ID currently associated with the merchant.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant to retrieve. The merchant must be owned by the calling account.

contactEmail.description: Email address of the merchant's primary contact.

contactFirst.description: First name of the merchant's primary contact.

contactLast.description: Last name of the merchant's primary contact.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant.

merchantName.description: Legal or trading name of the merchant business.

referenceId.description: The ID you use in your own system to identify this merchant.

status.description: Derived TaxCloud lifecycle status: 'taxcloud_invited' (invite sent, not yet accepted), 'taxcloud_connected' (TaxCloud credentials set and active), 'taxcloud_disconnected' (previously connected, now disconnected), or 'external_compliance' (managed outside TaxCloud).

components.description: Per-component health, keyed by component name (e.g. database, cache, geocoding).

status.description: Overall health of the API: 'healthy' (all components OK), 'degraded' (one or more non-critical components impaired), or 'unhealthy' (a critical component is failing).

timestamp.description: Time at which the health check was evaluated (RFC 3339).

contactEmail.description: Email address of the merchant's primary contact.

contactFirst.description: First name of the merchant's primary contact.

contactLast.description: Last name of the merchant's primary contact.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant.

merchantName.description: Legal or trading name of the merchant business.

referenceId.description: The ID you use in your own system to identify this merchant.

status.description: Derived TaxCloud lifecycle status: 'taxcloud_invited' (invite sent, not yet accepted), 'taxcloud_connected' (TaxCloud credentials set and active), 'taxcloud_disconnected' (previously connected, now disconnected), or 'external_compliance' (managed outside TaxCloud).

items.description: The carts to calculate tax for. Most integrations send a single cart; up to 100 carts may be calculated in one call.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant whose TaxCloud connection is used. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

transactionDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the carts are calculated for. Defaults to the current time when omitted.

customerBusinessDescription.description: Free-text description of the business. Provide when customerBusinessType is Other.

customerBusinessType.description: The type of business the customer is.

customerId.description: Your identifier for the exempt customer. Carts and orders submitted with this customerId can use the certificate.

customerName.description: Name of the customer or organization the certificate is issued to.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

reason.description: The reason the customer is exempt from sales tax.

reasonDescription.description: Short free-text elaboration of the exemption reason (maximum 20 characters).

states.description: The states the certificate is valid in, each as a two-letter abbreviation object.

certificateId.description: The certificateId returned when the exemption certificate was created.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

certificateId.description: The certificateId returned when the exemption certificate was created.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

ascending.description: Whether to sort results in ascending order. Defaults to false (descending).

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the nextCursor field of a previous response. Omit to start at the first page.

customerId.description: Filter results to certificates belonging to this customerId.

disabled.description: Set true to list disabled (revoked) certificates instead of active ones. Defaults to false.

limit.description: Maximum number of certificates to return per page. Defaults to 20; maximum 100.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

sortBy.description: The field to sort results by: 'createdDate' or 'id'. Defaults to 'id'.

cartId.description: The cartId returned by (or supplied to) /merchant/cart/calculate identifying the calculated cart to convert into an order.

completed.description: Whether the order has shipped, creating a tax liability. Defaults to false. Ignored when completedDate is provided.

completedDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the order was shipped on, which created the tax liability. Takes precedence over the completed field when provided.

kind.description: The kind of order to create: 'order' for a sale (default) or 'credit' for a credit order.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

orderId.description: Your identifier for the resulting order in your own system. Used later with /merchant/order/get, /merchant/order/update, and /merchant/refund/create.

batchId.description: Optional batch ID for grouping related orders.

channel.description: The sales channel the order came from. Pass one of amazon, ebay, or walmart to exclude marketplace-collected tax from filing.

completedDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the order was shipped on, which created the tax liability.

currency.description: The currency the line-item prices and tax amounts are denominated in.

customerId.description: Your identifier for the customer in your own system. Used to match exemption certificates and order history.

deliveredBySeller.description: Whether the seller delivers the order directly (own vehicles) rather than via common carrier. Affects taxability of delivery charges in some states.

destination.description: The ship-to (destination) address of the sale.

discounts.description: Optional line-item and order-level discounts to apply. If omitted, prices are used as is.

excludeFromFiling.description: Whether to exclude the order from tax filing.

exemption.description: Optional exemption information for the customer.

kind.description: The kind of order: 'order' for a sale (default) or 'credit' for a credit order.

lineItems.description: The items on the order, each including the tax rate and amount that was collected.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

orderId.description: Your identifier for the order in your own system. Used later with /merchant/order/get, /merchant/order/update, and /merchant/refund/create.

origin.description: The ship-from (origin) address of the sale.

transactionDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the order was purchased on.

expand.description: Set to 'refunds' to include the order's refunds in the response. Forwarded to TaxCloud as a query parameter.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

orderId.description: Your identifier for the order to retrieve, as supplied when the order was created.

completedDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the order was shipped on, which creates the tax liability.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

orderId.description: Your identifier for the order to update, as supplied when the order was created. Consumed for routing and not forwarded in the update payload.

batchId.description: Optional batch ID for grouping related refunds.

items.description: The line items and quantities to refund. Omit (or send an empty array) to refund the entire order.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant. Must be owned by the calling account. Consumed by the Ziptax layer for routing and not forwarded to TaxCloud.

orderId.description: Your identifier for the order to refund, as supplied when the order was created. Consumed for routing and not forwarded in the refund payload.

returnedDate.description: Include only if this return amends a previously filed sales tax return; providing it triggers an Amended Sales Tax Return. Not typically recommended.

buildTime.description: Timestamp the running binary was built.

environment.description: Deployment environment the API is running in (e.g. production, staging).

features.description: Map of feature flags to whether they are enabled in this deployment.

gitCommit.description: Git commit hash the running binary was built from.

metadata.description: Additional free-form key/value metadata about the deployment.

core_request_count.description: Number of core (tax lookup) requests the account has consumed in the current billing period.

core_request_limit.description: Maximum core requests allowed for the account in the current period, from the account's entitlement.

core_usage_percent.description: Core request usage as a percentage of the limit (0–100).

geo_enabled.description: Whether the account has the geocoding (geo_enabled) entitlement that allows address and coordinate lookups.

geo_request_count.description: Number of geocoding requests the account has consumed in the current period.

geo_request_limit.description: Maximum geocoding requests allowed for the account in the current period.

geo_usage_percent.description: Geocoding request usage as a percentage of the limit (0–100).

is_active.description: Whether the account is currently active and able to make requests.

last_updated.description: Time the usage counters were last updated (RFC 3339).

itemId.description: The itemId of the line item to refund. Must match an itemId from the original order.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item to refund. May be fractional and must not exceed the quantity on the original order.

apiKey.description: TaxCloud API key to associate with the merchant. Stored encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM.

connectionId.description: TaxCloud connection ID that pairs with the API key to identify the merchant's TaxCloud integration.

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant whose TaxCloud credentials are being set. The merchant must be owned by the calling account.
UUID of the merchant whose credentials were set.

label.description: Longer, localized description of what the TIC category covers.

nl_label.description: Non-localized (base English) description of the TIC category, independent of locale.

nl_title.description: Non-localized (base English) title of the TIC category, independent of locale.

parent.description: TIC code of this code's parent category in the TIC hierarchy; empty for top-level categories.

title.description: Short, localized human-readable title of the TIC category.

error.description: Error string formatted as "<code> - <message>" on failure; null on success

naturalLabel.description: Natural-language label for the recommended TIC

product_description.description: Normalized product description used for matching

query.description: Free-text product description to get a recommended TIC for

tic_list.description: Full list of Taxability Information Codes (TICs) available to the account.

query.description: Free-text product description to match against TIC codes

$schema.description: URL to the JSON Schema for this response

nextCursor.description: Cursor for retrieving the next page of results

label.description: Descriptive label for the TIC, when available

name.description: Human-readable label for the matched TIC

city.description: City or post-town of the address.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the address. US (United States) or CA (Canada). Defaults to US when omitted.

line1.description: First line of the address: street number and name, PO Box, or building. Values longer than 50 characters are automatically truncated by TaxCloud.

line2.description: Second line of the address, if any (e.g. apartment, suite, or unit number). Values longer than 50 characters are automatically truncated by TaxCloud.

state.description: State, province, or other large territorial division, as a two-letter abbreviation (e.g. MN, CA, ON).

zip.description: Postal or ZIP code. Five-digit (55401) and ZIP+4 (55401-2427) formats are accepted for US addresses.

cartId.description: Your identifier for this cart. If omitted, TaxCloud generates one and returns it in the response; either way, pass it to /merchant/order/create-from-cart to capture the cart as an order.

currency.description: The currency the line-item prices are denominated in.

customerId.description: Your identifier for the customer in your own system. Used to match exemption certificates and order history.

deliveredBySeller.description: Whether the seller delivers the order directly (own vehicles) rather than via common carrier. Affects taxability of delivery charges in some states.

destination.description: The ship-to (destination) address of the sale. Tax is generally calculated for this address in destination-sourced states.

discounts.description: Optional line-item and order-level discounts to apply. If omitted, prices are used as is.

exemption.description: Optional exemption information for the customer. When the customer is exempt, calculated tax is zero for exempt jurisdictions.

lineItems.description: The line items in the cart. Tax is calculated per item and returned per item in the response.

origin.description: The ship-from (origin) address of the sale. Used together with destination to determine sourcing and the applicable jurisdictions.

index.description: Zero-based position of the item within the cart. Each line item must have a unique index.

itemId.description: Your unique identifier for the line item (e.g. SKU or line reference). Used to match line items in later order, refund, and discount operations.

price.description: Unit price of the item, in the cart's currency. When discounts are provided, this must be the pre-discount (original) price; tax is calculated on the discounted amount.

productId.description: Unique ID of the product in the merchant's TaxCloud product catalog (e.g. SKU). Must match an existing catalog product when provided.

quantity.description: Quantity of the item. Fractional quantities are allowed. For quantities above the maximum, send a single line with quantity 1 and the extended (total) amount as the price.

tic.description: Taxability Information Code (TIC) classifying the product for product-specific tax rules (e.g. 11010 for shipping). Defaults to 0 (general tangible goods) when omitted.

index.description: Zero-based position of the item within the order. Each line item must have a unique index.

itemId.description: Your unique identifier for the line item (e.g. SKU or line reference). Referenced by refunds and discounts.

price.description: Unit price of the item that tax was calculated on, in the order's currency.

productId.description: Unique ID of the product in the merchant's TaxCloud product catalog. Must match an existing catalog product when provided.

quantity.description: Quantity of the item. Fractional quantities are allowed. For quantities above the maximum, send a single line with quantity 1 and the extended (total) amount as the price.

tax.description: The tax rate and amount collected for this line item. Required when creating an order directly (the amounts were computed by your checkout).

tic.description: Taxability Information Code (TIC) classifying the product for product-specific tax rules. Defaults to 0 (general tangible goods) when omitted.

index.description: Zero-based position of the item within the cart or order.

itemId.description: Your unique identifier for the line item, as submitted.

originalPrice.description: The original (pre-discount) unit price, as submitted.

price.description: The unit price tax was calculated on. When discounts were applied, this is the discounted unit price.

tax.description: The tax rate and amount calculated for this line item.

tic.description: Taxability Information Code (TIC) the item was calculated under. Null when no TIC applies.

cartId.description: Identifier of the calculated cart. Pass this to /merchant/order/create-from-cart to capture the cart as an order.

currency.description: The currency the prices and tax amounts are denominated in.

customerId.description: Your identifier for the customer, as submitted.

deliveredBySeller.description: Whether the seller delivers the order directly, as submitted (false when omitted).

exemption.description: The exemption information applied to the calculation.

lineItems.description: The submitted line items, each with its calculated tax rate and amount.

items.description: The exemption certificates on this page of results.

limit.description: The maximum number of results per page that was applied.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor to pass as 'cursor' on the next call to fetch the following page. Null when there are no further results.

accountId.description: The TaxCloud account id the certificate belongs to.

certificateId.description: TaxCloud's identifier for the exemption certificate. Use it with /merchant/cert/get, /merchant/cert/delete, and as exemptionId on carts and orders.

connectionId.description: The TaxCloud connection the certificate belongs to.

createdDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the certificate was created.

customerBusinessDescription.description: Free-text description of the business, present when customerBusinessType is Other.

customerBusinessType.description: The type of business the customer is (e.g. RetailTrade, Government, NonprofitOrganization).

customerId.description: Your identifier for the exempt customer.

customerName.description: Name of the customer the certificate was issued to.

disabledAt.description: RFC3339 datetime the certificate was disabled, or null while it is active.

reason.description: The reason the customer is exempt (e.g. Resale, FederalGovernment, CharitableOrganization).

reasonDescription.description: Free-text elaboration of the exemption reason.

singlePurchase.description: Whether the certificate covers a single purchase only, rather than being a blanket certificate.

states.description: The states the certificate is valid in.

currencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code the line-item prices are denominated in. USD or CAD. Defaults to USD when omitted.

lineItemDiscounts.description: Discounts applied to specific line items, applied before any order-level discount. Each entry must reference a valid itemId from the lineItems array.

orderDiscount.description: A discount applied to the entire order, applied after line-item discounts. Shipping items (TICs 11010-11015) and Colorado retail delivery fees (TIC 11098) are excluded from order-level discount calculations.

abbreviation.description: Two-letter abbreviation of a state the exemption certificate is valid in.

exemptionId.description: Identifier of an exemption certificate previously created for the customer (see /merchant/cert/create). When provided, the customer is treated as exempt and the certificate is associated with the transaction.

isExempt.description: Whether the customer is exempt from sales tax. Assumed true when exemptionId is provided.

itemId.description: The itemId of the line item this discount applies to. Must match an itemId in the lineItems array.

type.description: The kind of discount: 'percentage' (a fraction of the price) or 'amount' (a fixed currency amount).

value.description: The discount value: a decimal fraction between 0 and 1 for 'percentage' (e.g. 0.1 = 10% off), or a currency amount for 'amount'. When discounts are provided, line-item prices must be pre-discount (original) prices.

type.description: The kind of discount: 'percentage' (a fraction of the order total) or 'amount' (a fixed currency amount).

value.description: The discount value: a decimal fraction between 0 and 1 for 'percentage', or a currency amount for 'amount'. When discounts are provided, line-item prices must be pre-discount (original) prices.

batchId.description: Batch ID grouping this order with related orders, if one was supplied.

channel.description: The sales channel the order came from (e.g. amazon, ebay, walmart). Null when no channel was recorded.

completedDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the order was shipped/completed on, creating the tax liability. Absent for orders that are not yet completed.

connectionId.description: The TaxCloud connection the order was recorded under.

currency.description: The currency the prices and tax amounts are denominated in.

customerId.description: Your identifier for the customer in your own system.

deliveredBySeller.description: Whether the seller delivered the order directly.

destination.description: The ship-to (destination) address of the order.

excludeFromFiling.description: Whether the order is excluded from tax filing.

exemption.description: The exemption information recorded on the order.

kind.description: The kind of order: 'order' for a sale or 'credit' for a credit order.

lineItems.description: The order's line items, each with its tax rate and amount.

orderId.description: Your identifier for the order in your own system.

origin.description: The ship-from (origin) address of the order.

refunds.description: Refunds recorded against this order. Only included when the request set expand to 'refunds'.

transactionDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the order was purchased on.

index.description: Zero-based position of the item within the refund.

itemId.description: The itemId of the refunded line item, matching the original order.

price.description: The unit price refunded, calculated automatically from the order. When the order had discounts, this reflects the discounted amount actually paid.

tax.description: The tax amount refunded for this line item.

tic.description: Taxability Information Code (TIC) of the refunded item.

batchId.description: Batch ID grouping this refund with related refunds, if one was supplied.

connectionId.description: The TaxCloud connection the refund was recorded under.

createdDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the refund was created.

items.description: The refunded line items, each with the refunded price, quantity, and tax amount.

returnedDate.description: RFC3339 datetime the refund took effect.

amount.description: The tax amount refunded for the item, calculated proportionally from the order's tax. When the order had discounts, this reflects tax on the discounted price.
The calculated tax amount for the line item, in the transaction currency.

rate.description: The combined tax rate applied to the line item, as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.08125 = 8.125%).

merchantId.description: UUID of the merchant to update. The merchant must be owned by the calling account.

update.description: New field values for the merchant

merchantId.description: UUID of the updated merchant.

contactEmail.description: Updated email address of the merchant's primary contact. Optional.

contactFirst.description: Updated first name of the merchant's primary contact. Optional.

contactLast.description: Updated last name of the merchant's primary contact. Optional.

merchantName.description: New legal or trading name of the merchant business. Required; must be 1–255 characters.

referenceId.description: The ID you use in your own system to identify this merchant.

rCode.description: Numeric status of the request. 100 = success; 101 = invalid/unknown API key; 102 = invalid state; 103 = invalid city; 104 = invalid postal code; 105 = invalid query string; 106 = unknown API error; 107 = feature/version not enabled for the plan; 108 = request rate limit exceeded; 109 = missing/incomplete/invalid address; 110 = valid request but no result found; 111 = invalid historical parameter; 112 = Canadian (international) rates not enabled; 113 = product rate rules not enabled.

results.description: Tax rate results for the request. Postal-code-only lookups can return multiple entries (one per overlapping jurisdiction); address and coordinate lookups return a single entry. Empty when no rate is found (response code 110).

version.description: Schema version of the response payload (e.g. 'v10').

geoCity.description: Uppercase city name of the matched location, as resolved by geocoding.

geoCounty.description: Uppercase county name of the matched location.

geoPostalCode.description: 5-digit postal code of the matched jurisdiction, as resolved by geocoding.

geoState.description: Two-letter uppercase USPS state code of the matched location.

taxSales.description: Combined sales tax rate for the location as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.095 = 9.5%). Sum of the applicable state, county, city, and district sales tax rates.

taxUse.description: Combined use tax rate for the location as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.095 = 9.5%). Sum of the applicable state, county, city, and district use tax rates.

txbFreight.description: Whether freight/shipping is taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

txbService.description: Whether services/labor are taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

rCode.description: Numeric status of the request. 100 = success; 101 = invalid/unknown API key; 102 = invalid state; 103 = invalid city; 104 = invalid postal code; 105 = invalid query string; 106 = unknown API error; 107 = feature/version not enabled for the plan; 108 = request rate limit exceeded; 109 = missing/incomplete/invalid address; 110 = valid request but no result found; 111 = invalid historical parameter; 112 = Canadian (international) rates not enabled; 113 = product rate rules not enabled.

results.description: Tax rate results for the request, each with a state/county/city breakdown. Empty when no rate is found (response code 110).

version.description: Schema version of the response payload (e.g. 'v20').

citySalesTax.description: City-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction. 0 when the location has no city-level tax.

cityTaxCode.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) for the city; empty when the location has no city-level tax.

cityUseTax.description: City-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction. 0 when the location has no city-level tax.

countySalesTax.description: County-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

countyTaxCode.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) for the county; empty when the location has no county-level tax.

countyUseTax.description: County-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

geoCity.description: Uppercase city name of the matched location, as resolved by geocoding.

geoCounty.description: Uppercase county name of the matched location.

geoPostalCode.description: 5-digit postal code of the matched jurisdiction, as resolved by geocoding.

geoState.description: Two-letter uppercase USPS state code of the matched location.

stateSalesTax.description: State-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

stateUseTax.description: State-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

taxSales.description: Combined sales tax rate for the location as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.095 = 9.5%). Sum of the applicable state, county, city, and district sales tax rates.

taxUse.description: Combined use tax rate for the location as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.095 = 9.5%). Sum of the applicable state, county, city, and district use tax rates.

txbFreight.description: Whether freight/shipping is taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

txbService.description: Whether services/labor are taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

rCode.description: Numeric status of the request. 100 = success; 101 = invalid/unknown API key; 102 = invalid state; 103 = invalid city; 104 = invalid postal code; 105 = invalid query string; 106 = unknown API error; 107 = feature/version not enabled for the plan; 108 = request rate limit exceeded; 109 = missing/incomplete/invalid address; 110 = valid request but no result found; 111 = invalid historical parameter; 112 = Canadian (international) rates not enabled; 113 = product rate rules not enabled.

results.description: Tax rate results for the request, each with a state/county/city breakdown plus up to five special districts. Empty when no rate is found (response code 110).

version.description: Schema version of the response payload (e.g. 'v40').

citySalesTax.description: City-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction. 0 when the location has no city-level tax.

cityTaxCode.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) for the city; empty when the location has no city-level tax.

cityUseTax.description: City-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction. 0 when the location has no city-level tax.

countySalesTax.description: County-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

countyTaxCode.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) for the county; empty when the location has no county-level tax.

countyUseTax.description: County-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

district1Code.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) of the first special tax district applied to this location; empty when no first district applies.

district1SalesTax.description: Sales tax rate of the first special district, as a decimal fraction.

district1UseTax.description: Use tax rate of the first special district, as a decimal fraction.

districtSalesTax.description: Combined special-district sales tax rate (sum of the district1–district5 sales rates), as a decimal fraction. Special districts include transit authorities and other sub-county taxing areas.

districtUseTax.description: Combined special-district use tax rate (sum of the district1–district5 use rates), as a decimal fraction.

geoCity.description: Uppercase city name of the matched location, as resolved by geocoding.

geoCounty.description: Uppercase county name of the matched location.

geoPostalCode.description: 5-digit postal code of the matched jurisdiction, as resolved by geocoding.

geoState.description: Two-letter uppercase USPS state code of the matched location.

stateSalesTax.description: State-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

stateUseTax.description: State-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

taxSales.description: Combined sales tax rate for the location as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.095 = 9.5%). Sum of the applicable state, county, city, and district sales tax rates.

taxUse.description: Combined use tax rate for the location as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.095 = 9.5%). Sum of the applicable state, county, city, and district use tax rates.

txbFreight.description: Whether freight/shipping is taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

txbService.description: Whether services/labor are taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

geoLat.description: Latitude of the geocoded location, or 0 when the location was not geocoded.

geoLng.description: Longitude of the geocoded location, or 0 when the location was not geocoded.

incorporated.description: Whether the geocoded point falls within incorporated city limits, as the string 'true' or 'false'.

normalizedAddress.description: Standardized address returned by the geocoder, or empty when the location was not geocoded (e.g. postal-code-only lookups).

addressDetail.description: Normalized and geocoded address details used for the lookup.

rCode.description: Numeric status of the request. 100 = success; 101 = invalid/unknown API key; 102 = invalid state; 103 = invalid city; 104 = invalid postal code; 105 = invalid query string; 106 = unknown API error; 107 = feature/version not enabled for the plan; 108 = request rate limit exceeded; 109 = missing/incomplete/invalid address; 110 = valid request but no result found; 111 = invalid historical parameter; 112 = Canadian (international) rates not enabled; 113 = product rate rules not enabled.

results.description: Tax rate results for the request, each with a full state/county/city/district breakdown and sourcing model. Empty when no rate is found (response code 110).

satTaxDetail.description: Tennessee Single Article Tax breakdown. Present only when sat_item_total is supplied and the resolved location is in Tennessee.

version.description: Schema version of the response payload (e.g. 'v50').

appliedTotal.description: Item total (dollars, formatted as a string) used as the basis for the Tennessee Single Article Tax calculation; echoes the sat_item_total request parameter.

countyTaxRate.description: County tax rate (formatted as a string) applied in the single-article tax calculation.

localTaxLimit.description: Maximum dollar amount of a single article that is subject to local tax under Tennessee SAT rules (formatted as a string).

localTaxTotal.description: Total local tax (dollars, formatted as a string) computed for the single article up to the local tax limit.

stateAdditionalTaxTotal.description: Additional state single-article tax (dollars, formatted as a string) applied to the portion of the item above the local tax limit.

citySalesTax.description: City-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction. 0 when the location has no city-level tax.

cityTaxCode.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) for the city; empty when the location has no city-level tax.

cityUseTax.description: City-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction. 0 when the location has no city-level tax.

countySalesTax.description: County-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

countyTaxCode.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) for the county; empty when the location has no county-level tax.

countyUseTax.description: County-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

district1Code.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) of the first special tax district applied to this location; empty when no first district applies.

district1SalesTax.description: Sales tax rate of the first special district, as a decimal fraction.

district1UseTax.description: Use tax rate of the first special district, as a decimal fraction.

district2Code.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) of the second special tax district; empty when no second district applies.

district2SalesTax.description: Sales tax rate of the second special district, as a decimal fraction.

district2UseTax.description: Use tax rate of the second special district, as a decimal fraction.

district3Code.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) of the third special tax district; empty when no third district applies.

district3SalesTax.description: Sales tax rate of the third special district, as a decimal fraction.

district3UseTax.description: Use tax rate of the third special district, as a decimal fraction.

district4Code.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) of the fourth special tax district; empty when no fourth district applies.

district4SalesTax.description: Sales tax rate of the fourth special district, as a decimal fraction.

district4UseTax.description: Use tax rate of the fourth special district, as a decimal fraction.

district5Code.description: Tax code (jurisdiction identifier) of the fifth special tax district; empty when no fifth district applies.

district5SalesTax.description: Sales tax rate of the fifth special district, as a decimal fraction.

district5UseTax.description: Use tax rate of the fifth special district, as a decimal fraction.

districtSalesTax.description: Combined special-district sales tax rate (sum of the district1–district5 sales rates), as a decimal fraction. Special districts include transit authorities and other sub-county taxing areas.

districtUseTax.description: Combined special-district use tax rate (sum of the district1–district5 use rates), as a decimal fraction.

geoCity.description: Uppercase city name of the matched location, as resolved by geocoding.

geoCounty.description: Uppercase county name of the matched location.

geoPostalCode.description: 5-digit postal code of the matched jurisdiction, as resolved by geocoding.

geoState.description: Two-letter uppercase USPS state code of the matched location.

originDestination.description: Sourcing model used for this location: 'D' = destination-based (rate of the ship-to address), 'O' = origin-based (rate of the ship-from address).

stateSalesTax.description: State-level portion of the sales tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

stateUseTax.description: State-level portion of the use tax rate, as a decimal fraction.

taxSales.description: Combined sales tax rate for the location as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.095 = 9.5%). Sum of the applicable state, county, city, and district sales tax rates.

taxUse.description: Combined use tax rate for the location as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.095 = 9.5%). Sum of the applicable state, county, city, and district use tax rates.

txbFreight.description: Whether freight/shipping is taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

txbService.description: Whether services/labor are taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

countryCode.description: ISO-3 country code of the geocoded location (e.g. USA, CAN).

countryName.description: Full country name of the geocoded location (e.g. United States, Canada).

stateCode.description: State or province code (e.g. CA, ON).

postalCode.description: Full postal code (ZIP+4 for US addresses when available; full Canadian postal code for Canadian addresses).

normalizedAddress.description: Standardized address returned by the geocoder, or empty when the location was not geocoded (e.g. postal-code-only lookups).

incorporated.description: Whether the location falls within incorporated city limits, as the string 'true' or 'false'.

geoLat.description: Latitude of the geocoded location, or 0 when the location was not geocoded.

geoLng.description: Longitude of the geocoded location, or 0 when the location was not geocoded.

address.description: Extended address components from the geocoder. Present only when addressDetailExtended=true is supplied on a geocoded (address or lat/lng) lookup. Available for both USA and Canadian lookups.

jur_description.description: Human-readable label combining the jurisdiction and tax type (e.g. 'US State Sales Tax').

jur_name.description: Name or code of the jurisdiction: state alpha code, county/city name, or district label (e.g. 'CA', 'ORANGE', 'Local District: 37').

jur_tax_code.description: FIPS-like tax code for the jurisdiction (state, county, city, or district). Empty when the jurisdiction has no associated code.

jur_type.description: Jurisdiction level combined with the tax kind (sales vs use) this component represents.

rate.description: Tax rate for this jurisdiction/tax-type component, as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.0625 = 6.25%).

rate_id.description: Identifier of the source rate row in the underlying tax table.

rCode.description: Numeric status of the request. 100 = success; 101 = invalid/unknown API key; 102 = invalid state; 103 = invalid city; 104 = invalid postal code; 105 = invalid query string; 106 = unknown API error; 107 = feature/version not enabled for the plan; 108 = request rate limit exceeded; 109 = missing/incomplete/invalid address; 110 = valid request but no result found; 111 = invalid historical parameter; 112 = Canadian (international) rates not enabled; 113 = product rate rules not enabled.

version.description: Schema version of the response payload.

description.description: Human-readable description of the sourcing model applied (e.g. 'Destination Based Taxation').

value.description: Sourcing basis for the location: 'O' = origin-based (ship-from rate), 'D' = destination-based (ship-to rate).

taxabilityCode.description: Resolved taxability code details and the product rate rules that apply in this jurisdiction.

effectiveDt.description: Date the rule takes effect, in YYYYMMDD format; null when not specified.

effectiveTaxRate.description: Decimal tax rate that applies to this product in this jurisdiction; null when not specified.

exemptOver.description: Amounts above this dollar value are exempt; null when not specified.

exemptUnder.description: Line-item exemption threshold; amounts below this dollar value are exempt; null when not specified.

expiresDt.description: Date the rule expires, in YYYYMMDD format; null means the rule is still in effect.

isDestinationTaxType.description: Whether the rule follows destination-based sourcing; null when not specified.

isFoodDrug.description: Hint indicating the product falls under food/drug category classification; null when not specified.

jurTaxCode.description: FIPS-like code identifying the jurisdiction (state, county, or city) the rule applies to; null when not specified.

perVolumeTaxRate.description: Per-volume tax rate for volume-based TIC overrides (e.g., $0.05/mL); null when not applicable.

perVolumeUnit.description: Unit of measurement for perVolumeTaxRate (e.g., mL); null when not applicable.

percentTaxable.description: Fraction of the sale that is taxable (for example, 0.5 means half-exempt); null when not specified.

rateCapPerUnit.description: Maximum tax rate cap per unit for capped TIC overrides (e.g., $0.30/cigar); null when not applicable.

taxablePortionOver.description: Only the amount over this threshold is taxed; null when not specified.

addressDetail.description: Normalized and geocoded address details used for the lookup.

base_rates.description: Component tax rates broken out by jurisdiction level (state/county/city/district) and tax type (sales/use). Sum the relevant components to obtain a combined rate.

metadata.description: Versioning and response-code metadata for the request.

origin_destination.description: Sourcing model (origin- vs destination-based) that applies to the resolved location.

productDetail.description: Product-specific tax rules. Present only when a taxabilityCode is supplied on the request and the account carries the product_rates entitlement.

service.description: Whether services/labor are taxable in the resolved jurisdiction.

shipping.description: Whether freight/shipping is taxable in the resolved jurisdiction.

tax_summaries.description: Aggregated sales and use tax rates for the location, summarizing the base rate components.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the service taxability determination.

taxable.description: Whether services/labor are taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = the service is fully taxable and must be separately stated on the invoice; 'N' = the service is not taxable and must be separately stated on the invoice; 'L' = the service is not taxable, but the labor portion is taxable and both must be separately stated on the invoice.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the freight/shipping taxability determination.

taxable.description: Whether freight/shipping is taxable in this jurisdiction. 'Y' = taxable, 'N' = not taxable.

rate.description: Aggregated tax rate for this summary line, as a decimal fraction (e.g. 0.0775 = 7.75%).

summary_name.description: Human-readable name of the summary grouping (e.g. 'Sales Tax').

tax_type.description: Tax kind this summary aggregates: 'SALES_TAX' or 'USE_TAX'.

countyFIPS.description: County FIPS code resolved for the request location.

id.description: Taxability Information Code (TIC) supplied on the request.

examples: Medications dispensed pursuant to a prescription

rateActionCode.description: Outcome of the TIC lookup: T00 (valid TIC, rules listed), T01 (valid TIC, no applicable rate rules), T02 (invalid TIC), T03 (invalid TIC format).

rateRules.description: Product rate rules that apply to this TIC in the resolved jurisdiction, filtered to rules active on the current date.

stateFIPS.description: State FIPS code resolved for the request location.

info.description: Production-ready RESTful service for US and Canadian sales tax data lookup
info.title: ZipTax API

get.description: Returns usage metrics for the authenticated account

parameters.description: API key identifying the account whose usage metrics are returned. May be supplied as this query parameter or the X-API-KEY header.
parameters.name: key

schema.description: API key identifying the account whose usage metrics are returned. May be supplied as this query parameter or the X-API-KEY header.

parameters.description: Serialization format of the response body: 'json' (default) or 'xml'.
parameters.name: format

schema.description: Serialization format of the response body: 'json' (default) or 'xml'.

post.description: Calculates sales tax for one or more carts on behalf of a connected merchant. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud (POST /connections/{connectionId}/carts) using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim. Calculation has no lasting side effect and is safe to retry; capture the returned cartId with /merchant/order/create-from-cart to record the sale.

201.description: Resource created. TaxCloud's 201 response is relayed verbatim, including any Location header.

post.description: Creates an exemption certificate for one of the merchant's customers. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud POST /connections/{connectionId}/exemption-certificates using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim. Reference the returned certificateId as exemptionId on carts and orders to apply the exemption.

201.description: Resource created. TaxCloud's 201 response is relayed verbatim, including any Location header.

post.description: Deletes (disables) an exemption certificate so it can no longer be applied to new transactions. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud DELETE /connections/{connectionId}/exemption-certificates/{certificateId} using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim.

204.description: Resource deleted. TaxCloud's 204 (no content) response is relayed verbatim.

post.description: Retrieves a single exemption certificate. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud GET /connections/{connectionId}/exemption-certificates/{certificateId} using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim. This is a read and is safe to retry.

Lists the merchant's exemption certificates with cursor-based pagination. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud GET /exemption-certificates, scoped to the merchant's connection, with the optional filter fields mapped onto the query string; TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim. This is a read and is safe to retry.
Creates a new merchant under the authenticated account. Requires X-API-KEY header.
Deletes TaxCloud credentials for a merchant. The caller must own the merchant.
Retrieves TaxCloud credentials for a merchant. The caller must own the merchant.
Sets or updates TaxCloud credentials for a merchant. Credentials are encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM. On success an asynchronous webhook notification is sent to the configured endpoint.
Soft-deletes a merchant by setting deleted_at to now. The caller must own the merchant. If the merchant is already soft-deleted (deleted_at <= now), returns 404 — the merchant does not exist.
Returns a single merchant by UUID. The caller must own the merchant. Cross-account reads are blocked. Soft-deleted merchants (deleted_at <= now) are treated as non-existent and return 404.

get.description: Returns every active merchant owned by the calling account. A merchant is considered active when its deleted_at is NULL or set to a future date. Soft-deleted merchants (deleted_at <= now) are excluded from results.

post.description: Records an order directly, without a prior cart calculation; the tax amounts on each line item are the amounts your checkout collected. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud POST /connections/{connectionId}/orders using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim.

201.description: Resource created. TaxCloud's 201 response is relayed verbatim, including any Location header.

post.description: Captures a cart previously calculated with /merchant/cart/calculate as a recorded order. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud POST /connections/{connectionId}/carts/orders using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim.

201.description: Resource created. TaxCloud's 201 response is relayed verbatim, including any Location header.

post.description: Retrieves a recorded order. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud GET /connections/{connectionId}/orders/{orderId} using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim. This is a read and is safe to retry.

Modifies a recorded order; currently the completedDate can be set to mark the order shipped, creating the tax liability. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud PATCH /connections/{connectionId}/orders/{orderId} using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim. Updates overwrite the fields you send, so do not retry them blindly.

Refunds all or part of a recorded order. The request is forwarded to TaxCloud POST /connections/{connectionId}/orders/refunds/{orderId} using the merchant's stored credentials and TaxCloud's response is returned verbatim. Refund prices and tax amounts are calculated automatically from the order; when the order had discounts, refunds use the discounted prices actually paid. Do not retry refunds blindly - a duplicate submission records a duplicate refund.

201.description: Resource created. TaxCloud's 201 response is relayed verbatim, including any Location header.

post.description: Updates an existing merchant. The caller must own the merchant. Cross-account modification is blocked. Soft-deleted merchants (deleted_at <= now) are treated as non-existent and cannot be updated.

get.description: Returns basic tax rate information with 8 fields including combined rates

parameters.description: API key that authenticates the request and resolves the account's plan, entitlements, and rate limits. Supply it either as this query parameter or the X-API-KEY request header. A missing, malformed, or unknown key returns response code 101.
parameters.name: key

schema.description: API key that authenticates the request and resolves the account's plan, entitlements, and rate limits. Supply it either as this query parameter or the X-API-KEY request header. A missing, malformed, or unknown key returns response code 101.

parameters.description: Serialization format of the response body. 'json' (default) returns a JSON object; 'xml' returns the same data as an XML document.
parameters.name: format

schema.description: Serialization format of the response body. 'json' (default) returns a JSON object; 'xml' returns the same data as an XML document.

parameters.description: 5-digit US ZIP code to look up. When supplied on its own (no street address), the response may contain multiple results — one per tax jurisdiction that overlaps the ZIP. An invalid format returns response code 104.
parameters.name: postalcode

schema.description: 5-digit US ZIP code to look up. When supplied on its own (no street address), the response may contain multiple results — one per tax jurisdiction that overlaps the ZIP. An invalid format returns response code 104.

parameters.description: Street address to geocode to a single rooftop-level jurisdiction. When supplied (typically alongside city/state or postal code) the API geocodes the address and returns the one applicable rate. An incomplete or ungeocodable address returns response code 109.
parameters.name: address

schema.description: Street address to geocode to a single rooftop-level jurisdiction. When supplied (typically alongside city/state or postal code) the API geocodes the address and returns the one applicable rate. An incomplete or ungeocodable address returns response code 109.

parameters.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation. Used together with city or postal code to disambiguate the location. An invalid format returns response code 102.
parameters.name: state

schema.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation. Used together with city or postal code to disambiguate the location. An invalid format returns response code 102.

parameters.description: City name used together with state to narrow the lookup when no street address is supplied. An invalid format returns response code 103.
parameters.name: city

parameters.description: API key for authentication

get.description:
Returns comprehensive tax rates with geocoding support, multi-district breakdown,
			and Tennessee Single Article Tax calculations. Supports both USA and Canada.

parameters.description: API key that authenticates the request and resolves the account's plan, entitlements, and rate limits. Supply it either as this query parameter or the X-API-KEY request header. A missing, malformed, or unknown key returns response code 101.
parameters.name: key

schema.description: API key that authenticates the request and resolves the account's plan, entitlements, and rate limits. Supply it either as this query parameter or the X-API-KEY request header. A missing, malformed, or unknown key returns response code 101.

parameters.description: Serialization format of the response body. 'json' (default) returns a JSON object; 'xml' returns the same data as an XML document.
parameters.name: format

schema.description: Serialization format of the response body. 'json' (default) returns a JSON object; 'xml' returns the same data as an XML document.

parameters.description: Country of the lookup: 'USA' (default), 'CAN', or a US territory (ASM, GUM, MNP, PRI, VIR). 'CAN' requires the Canadian rates (rate_loc_can) entitlement; otherwise the request returns response code 112. US territories are looked up via the USA path and require no additional entitlement.
parameters.name: countryCode

schema.description: Country of the lookup: 'USA' (default), 'CAN', or a US territory (ASM, GUM, MNP, PRI, VIR). 'CAN' requires the Canadian rates (rate_loc_can) entitlement; otherwise the request returns response code 112. US territories are looked up via the USA path and require no additional entitlement.

parameters.description: 5-digit US ZIP code to look up. When supplied on its own the response may contain multiple results, one per overlapping jurisdiction. An invalid format returns response code 104.
parameters.name: postalcode

schema.description: 5-digit US ZIP code to look up. When supplied on its own the response may contain multiple results, one per overlapping jurisdiction. An invalid format returns response code 104.

parameters.description: Street address to geocode to a single rooftop-level jurisdiction. Geocoding requires the geo_enabled entitlement; an incomplete or ungeocodable address returns response code 109.
parameters.name: address

schema.description: Street address to geocode to a single rooftop-level jurisdiction. Geocoding requires the geo_enabled entitlement; an incomplete or ungeocodable address returns response code 109.

parameters.description: State name or two-letter abbreviation. Used with city or postal code to disambiguate the location. An invalid format returns response code 102.
parameters.name: state

schema.description: State name or two-letter abbreviation. Used with city or postal code to disambiguate the location. An invalid format returns response code 102.

parameters.description: Two-letter state code (e.g. CA). Alternative to 'state' for supplying the state as a code rather than a name.
parameters.name: stateCode

schema.description: Two-letter state code (e.g. CA). Alternative to 'state' for supplying the state as a code rather than a name.

parameters.description: City name used together with state to narrow the lookup when no street address is supplied. An invalid format returns response code 103.
parameters.name: city

schema.description: City name used together with state to narrow the lookup when no street address is supplied. An invalid format returns response code 103.

parameters.description: County name used to refine the lookup when supplied without a street address.
parameters.name: county

schema.description: County name used to refine the lookup when supplied without a street address.

parameters.description: Latitude of a geographic point. When both lat and lng are supplied the API resolves the single jurisdiction containing that point (coordinate lookup).
parameters.name: lat

schema.description: Latitude of a geographic point. When both lat and lng are supplied the API resolves the single jurisdiction containing that point (coordinate lookup).

parameters.description: Longitude of a geographic point. When both lat and lng are supplied the API resolves the single jurisdiction containing that point (coordinate lookup).
parameters.name: lng

schema.description: Longitude of a geographic point. When both lat and lng are supplied the API resolves the single jurisdiction containing that point (coordinate lookup).

parameters.description: Sourcing/unincorporated-area handling mode: 'auto' (default) lets the API determine the correct sourcing, 'origin' forces origin-based sourcing (ship-from rate), and 'destination' forces destination-based sourcing (ship-to rate).
parameters.name: adjustment

schema.description: Sourcing/unincorporated-area handling mode: 'auto' (default) lets the API determine the correct sourcing, 'origin' forces origin-based sourcing (ship-from rate), and 'destination' forces destination-based sourcing (ship-to rate).

parameters.description: Single-article item total in dollars used to compute Tennessee Single Article Tax (SAT). When greater than 0 and the location is in Tennessee, the response includes the satTaxDetail object describing the local tax limit and additional state tax on the single article.
parameters.name: sat_item_total

schema.description: Single-article item total in dollars used to compute Tennessee Single Article Tax (SAT). When greater than 0 and the location is in Tennessee, the response includes the satTaxDetail object describing the local tax limit and additional state tax on the single article.

parameters.description: Historical period to price the lookup against, formatted YYYYMM (6 digits, e.g. 202401). Returns the rates that were in effect for that month. Requires historical data to be enabled; an invalid format returns response code 111.
parameters.name: historical

schema.description: Historical period to price the lookup against, formatted YYYYMM (6 digits, e.g. 202401). Returns the rates that were in effect for that month. Requires historical data to be enabled; an invalid format returns response code 111.

get.description:
Returns tax rates in a new structured format with separate base rates,
			service/shipping taxability, and tax summaries. Built on v5.0 data but with enhanced organization

parameters.description: API key that authenticates the request and resolves the account's plan, entitlements, and rate limits. Supply it either as this query parameter or the X-API-KEY request header. A missing, malformed, or unknown key returns response code 101.
parameters.name: key

schema.description: API key that authenticates the request and resolves the account's plan, entitlements, and rate limits. Supply it either as this query parameter or the X-API-KEY request header. A missing, malformed, or unknown key returns response code 101.

parameters.description: Serialization format of the response body. 'json' (default) returns a JSON object; 'xml' returns the same data as an XML document.
parameters.name: format

schema.description: Serialization format of the response body. 'json' (default) returns a JSON object; 'xml' returns the same data as an XML document.

parameters.description: Country of the lookup: 'USA' (default), 'CAN', or a US territory (ASM, GUM, MNP, PRI, VIR). 'CAN' requires the Canadian rates (rate_loc_can) entitlement; otherwise the request returns response code 112. US territories are looked up via the USA path and require no additional entitlement.
parameters.name: countryCode

schema.description: Country of the lookup: 'USA' (default), 'CAN', or a US territory (ASM, GUM, MNP, PRI, VIR). 'CAN' requires the Canadian rates (rate_loc_can) entitlement; otherwise the request returns response code 112. US territories are looked up via the USA path and require no additional entitlement.

parameters.description: 5-digit US ZIP code to look up. When supplied on its own the response may contain rates for multiple overlapping jurisdictions. An invalid format returns response code 104.
parameters.name: postalcode

schema.description: 5-digit US ZIP code to look up. When supplied on its own the response may contain rates for multiple overlapping jurisdictions. An invalid format returns response code 104.

parameters.description: Street address to geocode to a single rooftop-level jurisdiction. Geocoding requires the geo_enabled entitlement; an incomplete or ungeocodable address returns response code 109.
parameters.name: address

schema.description: Street address to geocode to a single rooftop-level jurisdiction. Geocoding requires the geo_enabled entitlement; an incomplete or ungeocodable address returns response code 109.

parameters.description: State name or two-letter abbreviation. Used with city or postal code to disambiguate the location. An invalid format returns response code 102.
parameters.name: state

schema.description: State name or two-letter abbreviation. Used with city or postal code to disambiguate the location. An invalid format returns response code 102.

parameters.description: Two-letter state code (e.g. CA). Alternative to 'state' for supplying the state as a code rather than a name.
parameters.name: stateCode

schema.description: Two-letter state code (e.g. CA). Alternative to 'state' for supplying the state as a code rather than a name.

parameters.description: City name used together with state to narrow the lookup when no street address is supplied. An invalid format returns response code 103.
parameters.name: city

schema.description: City name used together with state to narrow the lookup when no street address is supplied. An invalid format returns response code 103.

parameters.description: County name used to refine the lookup when supplied without a street address.
parameters.name: county

schema.description: County name used to refine the lookup when supplied without a street address.

parameters.description: Latitude of a geographic point. When both lat and lng are supplied the API resolves the single jurisdiction containing that point (coordinate lookup).
parameters.name: lat

schema.description: Latitude of a geographic point. When both lat and lng are supplied the API resolves the single jurisdiction containing that point (coordinate lookup).

parameters.description: Longitude of a geographic point. When both lat and lng are supplied the API resolves the single jurisdiction containing that point (coordinate lookup).
parameters.name: lng

schema.description: Longitude of a geographic point. When both lat and lng are supplied the API resolves the single jurisdiction containing that point (coordinate lookup).

parameters.description: Single-article item total in dollars used to compute Tennessee Single Article Tax (SAT). When greater than 0 and the resolved location is in Tennessee, the response reflects the single-article tax limits in the tax summaries.
parameters.name: sat_item_total

schema.description: Single-article item total in dollars used to compute Tennessee Single Article Tax (SAT). When greater than 0 and the resolved location is in Tennessee, the response reflects the single-article tax limits in the tax summaries.

parameters.description: Historical period to price the lookup against, formatted YYYYMM (6 digits, e.g. 202401). Returns the rates that were in effect for that month. Requires historical data to be enabled; an invalid format returns response code 111.
parameters.name: historical

schema.description: Historical period to price the lookup against, formatted YYYYMM (6 digits, e.g. 202401). Returns the rates that were in effect for that month. Requires historical data to be enabled; an invalid format returns response code 111.

parameters.description: Product Taxability Information Code (TIC). When supplied, the response includes a productDetail object describing the rate rules that apply to that product category in the resolved jurisdiction. Accepts numeric standard TIC codes (e.g., 20010) or alphanumeric override codes (e.g., CIR00001). Requires the product_rates entitlement for standard codes.
parameters.name: taxabilityCode

schema.description: Product Taxability Information Code (TIC). When supplied, the response includes a productDetail object describing the rate rules that apply to that product category in the resolved jurisdiction. Accepts numeric standard TIC codes (e.g., 20010) or alphanumeric override codes (e.g., CIR00001). Requires the product_rates entitlement for standard codes.

parameters.description: When true, returns a full geocoding object in the response broken into address parts (street, city, postal code, etc.). Defaults to false.
parameters.name: addressDetailExtended

schema.description: When true, returns a full geocoding object in the response broken into address parts (street, city, postal code, etc.). Defaults to false.

parameters.description: When true, returns a detailed shipping object to help navigate collection complexity. The GENERAL_RULE value will be one of: EXEMPT, EXEMPT_WHEN_SEPARATELY_STATED, ITEM_SPECIFIC, CONDITIONAL, or TAXABLE. For EXEMPT_WHEN_SEPARATELY_STATED, the response includes a boolean flag, and a natural-language description is included for clarity. Defaults to false.
parameters.name: shippingExtended

schema.description: When true, returns a detailed shipping object to help navigate collection complexity. The GENERAL_RULE value will be one of: EXEMPT, EXEMPT_WHEN_SEPARATELY_STATED, ITEM_SPECIFIC, CONDITIONAL, or TAXABLE. For EXEMPT_WHEN_SEPARATELY_STATED, the response includes a boolean flag, and a natural-language description is included for clarity. Defaults to false.

post.description: Searches Taxability Information Codes (TIC) by free-text product description and returns ranked matches. Requires authentication via the X-API-KEY header or key query parameter.
Returns a recommended Taxability Information Code (TIC) for a free-text product description using a machine-learning model. Requires authentication via the X-API-KEY header or key query parameter.

get.description: Returns the health status of the API and its components
Returns system metadata including version and environment information

tags.description: Tax data and TIC code operations
tags.name: Data
